Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2025

1. Introduction

Kecktech IT Solutions LLC ("Kecktech," "we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website kecktech.net or use our services.

If you disagree with the terms of this Privacy Policy, please discontinue use of our website and services.

2. Information We Collect

Information You Provide

We collect information you voluntarily provide, including:

  • Name, email address, phone number, and business name when you contact us
  • Service inquiries submitted through our contact form
  • Communications sent to support@kecktech.net

Information Collected Automatically

We use Umami — a self-hosted, privacy-first analytics platform — to understand website traffic. Umami does not collect personally identifiable information, does not use cookies, and does not track users across websites. No data is shared with Google, Facebook, or any third-party advertising platform.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Respond to your inquiries and provide requested services
  • Send invoices, service updates, and support communications
  • Improve our website and services
  • Comply with legal obligations

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties.

4. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored on Kecktech's own servers, located in our facility in Park City, Kansas. We do not use Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, or any hyperscale cloud provider to store client data. Our facility is solar-powered and physically secured.

We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS), encrypted storage, access controls, and regular security audits.

5. HIPAA Compliance

For clients requiring HIPAA compliance, Kecktech offers a Business Associate Agreement (BAA). Our Sovereign Private Hosting service is configured for HIPAA-eligible workloads. Contact us at support@kecktech.net to request a BAA.

6. Cookies

Our website does not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or third-party analytics cookies. We use Umami Analytics, which is cookieless by design.

7. Third-Party Services

We do not embed Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any third-party tracking pixels on this website. Contact form submissions are processed by our own servers — your data does not pass through any third-party form service.

8. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to the personal information we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of your information
  • Opt out of non-essential communications

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@kecktech.net or (316) 768-0034.

9. Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such information, please contact us immediately.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new policy on this page with an updated date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

11. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:

Kecktech IT Solutions LLC
Park City, Kansas
Email: support@kecktech.net
Phone: (316) 768-0034

Solar-Powered. Sovereign Data.
AI-Built Apps. Disability-Led. Human-Centered.
